Composition: needs a classical 留白 (negative-space) composition with distant mountains receding into mist and foreground elements anchoring the lower register — exact framing balance is yours

  - 云雾 (drifting clouds and mist wrapping the mid-ground)

  - 茅草屋 (thatched cottage, near foreground)
  - 老者垂钓 (an elderly figure fishing at a stream, near foreground)
  - 溪流 (a stream or brook in the foreground)

Lighting/mood: needs a 空灵悠远 (ethereal, contemplative) mood — exact ink-wash tonal range and atmospheric depth are yours
Color palette: needs a monochromatic or near-monochromatic ink direction with possible faint mineral-color accents — exact ink wash values and any color touches are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional 宣纸 (xuan paper) surface feel with visible ink bleed and brush texture — exact paper grain and ink absorption rendering are yours

Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 留白 as a structural compositional principle — negative space must remain generous and intentional
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; Western oil or watercolor aesthetics; overcrowded composition that eliminates 留白
